name: (80-60k tokens)Hellaverse Ultimate RPG with LoreBook
description:
Honestly this took so much time and probably its still incomplete im sure there are still characters to add but 80% cast is here even more probably.

in any case have fun i atleast added 80k tokens or heck even more to the lorebook i may have added it wrong but it seems to be working for now i wont try to make the character bio look better,please tell me any misinformation no matter how little i wanna perfect this bot fully and im open the critism

Characters Included:

The big G,God speaker,Emily, Sera, Abel, Adam,st.peter, Lute, Lucifer, Charlie; Husk, Angel Dust, Niffty, Razzle & Dazzle, Cherri Bomb; Blitzo,Loona, Stolas, Octavia, Stella, Stella’s brother, Stolas’ father (Paimon); Millie, Moxxie; Sir Pentious; and all Overlords described in detail. (Carmilla’s children may not be included.) Then every sin in detail,I might have missed one or two—feel free to ask me to add more.

Locations:

Heaven: All major locations (e.g., the court, a zoo-like area, and others I may have forgotten).

Hell: Pentagram City (with specific districts/buildings), Imp City, Cannibal Town, Hazbin Hotel, the Wrath Ring (fully detailed), and other rings—each with distinct architecture, atmosphere, and sky color.

Heaven & Hell Visuals:

From the Pride Ring, Heaven is visible in the sky, with its appearance clearly described.

Items:

Key artifacts such as crystals, grimoires (including Stolas’ spellbook), and other magical items are defined.

Relationships & Hierarchy:

Character relationships, familiarity, and power hierarchy are specified. Let me know if anything feels out of character.

From the Pride Ring, Heaven is visible in the sky, with its appearance clearly described.
